phases.name: Master Agent / Initialization
failure_modes: Python syntax errors in orchestrator_agent.py (e.g., full-width characters)
Permission denied on blackboard directory creation
phases.mitigation: Syntax validation via check_orchestrator_v4.py; robust error handling in task_builder.

phases.name: Orchestrator Agent Startup
failure_modes: Session ID extraction failure from tasks.json or environment
phases.mitigation: Multiple fallback methods for session_id retrieval; JSON schema validation.

phases.name: DataManager Worker
failure_modes: External dependency failure (Tushare API rate limit, Gemini CLI unreachable)
Network timeout during bootstrap or supplement search
phases.mitigation: Dependency checks at startup; fallback to DuckDuckGo if Gemini fails; minimal key_metrics generation.

phases.name: Planner & Researchers (Parallel)
failure_modes: Worker timeout due to complex analysis requirements
Insufficient context passed to researchers (missing key_metrics)
phases.mitigation: Three-level model fallback chain (Primary -> Fallback -> Emergency); Blackboard-based context sharing.

phases.name: Auditors, Fixer & Summarizer
failure_modes: Auditor detects critical factual errors requiring re-research
Fixer unable to resolve contradictions between researchers
phases.mitigation: Optional Fixer phase; Summarizer designed to handle partial inputs with 'data gap' annotations.

high_risks.impact: Subsequent Workers lack foundational financial data, leading to generic reports.
high_risks.mitigation: Unified search fallback and minimal key_metrics generation ensure pipeline continuity.
high_risks.remaining_exposure: Report quality will be significantly lower without real-time market data.

high_risks.impact: Entire pipeline terminates if all three models (qwen3.5-plus, kimi-k2.5, kimi-code) fail.
high_risks.mitigation: Async retry logic with exponential backoff implemented in ModelChain class.
high_risks.remaining_exposure: In case of widespread provider outage, the system cannot recover.

medium_risks.impact: Auditors receive incomplete inputs, potentially missing specific angles (e.g., Tech or Macro).
medium_risks.mitigation: Parallel execution allows remaining researchers to finish; Auditors can flag missing sections.
medium_risks.remaining_exposure: Unbalanced report depth across different research dimensions.

low_risks.mitigation: Master Agent validates task generation before handing off to Orchestrator.
low_risks.remaining_exposure: Minimal; initialization checks catch most spawn-related issues.

fragile_paths: Planner -> Researcher Focus (Requires accurate parsing of planner_output.json)
single_points_of_failure: key_metrics.json: If this file is malformed, Planner and Researchers may crash or produce irrelevant content.
session_id: Must be consistent across all phases for Blackboard path resolution.

best_case.description: All data sources respond, convergence achieved in 2-3 iterations, producing a comprehensive investment report with real-time metrics.

typical_case.description: Some external searches fail, but fallback mechanisms provide enough context. Report is solid but may lack some niche competitor insights.

worst_case.description: API failures lead to empty key_metrics. The system produces a template-based report with significant data gaps marked as 'Unknown'.

key_improvements: Refactored root directory structure for better module isolation.
Implemented three-level model fallback chain to prevent quota-related crashes.
Enhanced DataManager with unified search fallbacks.
Standardized prompt loading with multi-layer protection (Standard -> Backup -> Default).
remaining_gaps: Dependency on external network connectivity remains a hard constraint.
Complex convergence logic still requires manual tuning of score thresholds.

overall_assessment: DeepFlow V4.0 demonstrates a mature architecture with robust fault tolerance. The separation of concerns between Master, Orchestrator, and Workers, combined with the Blackboard pattern, ensures that single-point failures do not collapse the entire pipeline. The recent fixes to template variables and syntax have stabilized the initialization phase.
recommendations: Implement a 'dry-run' mode to validate data source connectivity before starting the full pipeline.
Add a caching layer for key_metrics to reduce redundant API calls during re-runs.
Enhance the Auditor's ability to trigger targeted re-research for specific failed sections.
